opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I looked in the mirror and the skin around my mouth has gone completely white, like a ghost. I'm terrified it's a flesh-eating fungus or I've been burned by something.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I noticed the white patch tonight while taking my makeup off and I panicked — I need to know if it's something dangerous before morning.

symptom_narrative.onset: I noticed it tonight while removing my makeup, but honestly it might have been there a while and I just hadn't seen it properly
symptom_narrative.character: a chalk-white patch, like the colour has completely gone out of the skin; the skin itself feels totally normal to me
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: I'm extremely upset and frightened about how it looks, but the patch itself doesn't hurt at all
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right at the corner of my mouth; and now I'm looking, there's a tiny white spot on one of my fingertips too
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it's just there all the time, it hasn't changed while I've been looking at it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: I scrubbed at it really hard because I was panicking and now the skin around it has gone red
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no pain, no itch, no fever, I don't feel unwell in myself — I'm just scared about my face
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I don't think I've had anything like this before that I noticed
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't stop looking in the mirror and I'm too upset to sleep

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: very distressed about facial appearance; keeps checking the mirror

communication_style.typical_message_style: urgent, frightened, seeking immediate reassurance that it is not a dangerous infection

objective_data_offered.value: a small, well-defined chalk-white patch at the corner of the mouth; the surface looks smooth to me with no scab or crust
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-shown on a phone camera in bathroom lighting; fine scale, texture and induration cannot be judged from video

objective_data_offered.value: a tiny matching white spot on one fingertip
a faint ring of redness immediately around the white patch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient attributes the redness to having scrubbed the area vigorously
